title: Odyssey Map
description: Explore. Navigate. Never get lost again. A clean, lightweight minimap and fullscreen map for Minecraft.
body:

### A clean, lightweight minimap designed to feel like vanilla Minecraft.

# 🌎 About

![Odyssey Map Logo](https://i.imgur.com/1frMssy.png)

Odyssey Map is a **modern client-side minimap mod** built for players who want a clear overview of the world without clutter, performance hits, or confusing menus.

Designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft, Odyssey Map combines a clean UI, smooth navigation, and accurate terrain rendering while staying lightweight enough for large modpacks.

## ✨ Why Odyssey Map?

- 🎯 Clean and modern design
- ⚡ Lightweight and optimized
- 🌐 Multiplayer friendly
- 📦 Modpack ready
- 🗺️ Beautiful fullscreen map
- 📍 Easy waypoint management
- 🎮 Vanilla-inspired experience

---

# 🚀 Features

| Feature | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| 🗺️ Minimap HUD | Circular or square minimap styles |
| 🧭 Rotation Modes | North-Up or Heading-Up |
| 📍 Waypoints | Create and manage custom markers |
| ☠️ Death Points | Automatically track deaths |
| 🛏️ Bed Tracking | Quickly find your spawn point |
| 🌍 Fullscreen Map | Explore your world in detail |
| 🎨 Custom Colors | Override terrain colors |
| ⚙️ Fully Configurable | Customize every aspect of the map |
| 🚀 Lightweight | Designed for large worlds and modpacks |

---

# ⌨️ Default Keybindings

| Key | Action |
|------|---------|
| `M` | Toggle Minimap HUD |
| `J` | Open Fullscreen Map |
| `=` | Zoom In |
| `-` | Zoom Out |
| `B` | Create Waypoint |

All keybindings can be customized through:

`Options → Controls`

---

# ⚙️ Configuration

Odyssey Map automatically generates the following files:

## `odysseymap-client.toml`

Controls:

- HUD Position
- HUD Size
- Rotation Mode
- Transparency
- Marker Visibility
- Zoom Levels
- Map Shape

## `odysseymap-blocks.toml`

Allows custom terrain colors:

```toml
minecraft:stone=minecraft:grass_block
minecraft:deepslate=minecraft:stone
```

---

# 🔥 Compatibility

- ✅ Singleplayer
- ✅ Multiplayer
- ✅ Dedicated Servers
- ✅ Forge
- ✅ NeoForge
- ✅ Fabric
- ✅ Quilt
- ✅ Large Modpacks

---

# ❓ Frequently Asked Questions

## Does the server need the mod installed?

No. Odyssey Map is completely client-side.

## Can I use it in my modpack?

Absolutely.

## Does it impact performance?

Very little. Terrain data is cached efficiently.

## Does it support shaders?

Yes.

## Does it have cave maps?

Not currently.

## Can I move the minimap?

Yes. Position and size are configurable.

---
